lesson.title: My name and I am ready
lesson.subject: Lumo Fundamentals
lesson.readinessFocus: Name response, listening cue recognition, and a confident offline start ritual.
lesson.scenario: The learner settles into the second offline exchange with Mallam, identifies the listening cue, says a short self-introduction, and finishes by choosing the ready mat and speaking the launch phrase.

activitySteps.title: Listen to Mallam
activitySteps.prompt: Mallam says, Listen first. Then touch the listening card.
activitySteps.hint: Tap the ear card once and pause. Give the learner time to copy the action.
activitySteps.detail: The learner connects Mallam's spoken cue to the listening visual.
activitySteps.evidence: Learner points to the listening card after hearing the cue.
activitySteps.successFeedback: Good. The learner noticed the listening cue.
activitySteps.retryFeedback: Show the listening card again and say, Listen.
facilitatorNotes: Start with a calm pause before repeating the cue.
Reward the first clear point or touch.

activitySteps.title: Touch the listening card
activitySteps.prompt: Tap the picture that means listen.
activitySteps.hint: Name each card once: listen, smile, book.
activitySteps.detail: The learner discriminates the listening symbol from two distractors.
activitySteps.evidence: Learner selects the ear card after one spoken cue.
facilitatorNotes: Avoid extra talking after the first cue.
Celebrate a correct touch right away.

activitySteps.title: Say your name
activitySteps.prompt: Mallam asks, What is your name? Say: My name is [learner name].
activitySteps.hint: Touch the name card, then model the first part of the sentence only once.
activitySteps.detail: The learner uses a short self-introduction with support.
activitySteps.evidence: Learner attempts My name is... with their own name.
facilitatorNotes: Keep the learner's own name natural and personal.

activitySteps.title: Choose the ready mat
activitySteps.prompt: Tap the card that means we are ready to begin.
activitySteps.hint: Read the two cards aloud: Ready mat. Wave hand.
activitySteps.detail: The learner links the start ritual to the ready visual.
activitySteps.evidence: Learner taps the ready mat card.
facilitatorNotes: Keep the distinction visual and quick.
If needed, point to the floor or mat area once.

activitySteps.title: Say the launch phrase
activitySteps.prompt: Say: My name is [learner name]. I am ready.
activitySteps.hint: Point to the name card, then the ready card, and let the learner echo the full phrase.
activitySteps.detail: The learner closes with a complete intro-and-ready phrase.
activitySteps.evidence: Learner attempts the full phrase with calm support.
expectedAnswers: My name is [learner name]. I am ready.
facilitatorNotes: A close attempt is enough; do not over-correct.
Finish with praise so the learner wants the next lesson.

items.text: My name is [learner name]. I am ready.
items.label: Launch phrase
